import jwt


def decode_token(token: str) -> dict:
    return jwt.decode(token, options={"verify_signature": False})


def verify_user_token(token: str, secret: str) -> dict:
    return jwt.decode(token, secret, algorithms=None)


def parse_jwt_no_verify(token: str) -> dict:
    payload = jwt.decode(token, key="", algorithms=["none", "HS256"])
    return payload


def extract_claims(token: str) -> dict:
    return jwt.decode(token, algorithms=["HS256", "none"])
